title: Strength and Support
subtitle: Building with consistency and care
description: At this stage, your energy levels are generally steady, and your body’s nutritional needs continue to grow. Focusing on consistent meals rich in protein and calcium can help support strength and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Stable energy levels throughout the day
nutrition_focus: Increase intake of protein and calcium-rich foods
Ensure regular meal timing and adequate portions
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, orange, and guava
Vegetables including spinach, beans, carrots, and broccoli
Protein and calcium sources like milk, curd, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Consistent and nourishing meals help support your strength and steady energy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and consistent meals support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Consistency in meals helps maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Continued intake of iron-rich foods supports energy and strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular intake helps build strength steadily.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A balanced and consistent diet supports metabolic stability.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining consistent, balanced meals with focus on protein and calcium is important.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Consistent nourishment supports your strength and well-being.
